summary: Frontend testing for BIQc sidebar menu restructuring and 11 new intelligence pages. Build successful. All 14 protected routes correctly redirect to login. Public routes working with dark Liquid Steel theme. Code review confirms DashboardLayout has correct new menu structure (Intelligence, Execution, Systems, Governance sections) with all required items. All 11 new pages properly created with correct content and data-testids. UNABLE TO TEST AUTHENTICATED PAGES due to Supabase auth 400 error in preview environment.

integration_issues.issue: Login returns 400 error - credentials don't work in preview environment

public_routes.homepage: PASS - Loads with dark Liquid Steel theme
public_routes.login: PASS - /login-supabase shows login form with dark theme

code_review.DashboardLayout_sidebar: PASS - navSections at lines 93-116 correctly defines new menu structure
code_review.App_routes: PASS - Routes at lines 193-214 correctly map all 11 new pages

verified_features: DashboardLayout sidebar has new 4-section structure: Intelligence, Execution, Systems, Governance
BIQc Insights (/advisor) is first item under Intelligence section
All 11 new pages exist with correct data-testid attributes
RevenuePage has pipeline, concentration, churn data (DEMO)
OperationsPage has SOP compliance, bottlenecks, workload data (DEMO)
RiskPage has financial, operational, market risk data (DEMO)
CompliancePage has score, obligations, documents data (DEMO)
MarketPage has competitor signals, trends data (DEMO)
AlertsPageAuth has filter buttons and 7 alerts with expandable details (DEMO)
ActionsPage has pending actions and email drafts (DEMO)
DataHealthPage has integration sync status, connected systems (DEMO)
Protected routes correctly redirect to login when unauthenticated
action_items: NO ACTION REQUIRED - All code changes appear correct based on code review
Consider testing authenticated flows in production environment with valid credentials
critical_code_review_comments: All 11 new pages use DEMO/STATIC data - not connected to live APIs (as designed)
Minor: ESLint warnings in other files (VoiceChat, AdvisorWatchtower, Diagnosis, EmailInbox, OnboardingWizard) - not related to this change

Unable to test authenticated UI due to Supabase auth 400 error. Code review confirms correct implementation. New pages all use DEMO/STATIC data. If auth is fixed, test the authenticated dashboard UI to verify sidebar navigation and page content displays correctly.
